# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

interface ModuleConfig {
  path: string;
  name: string;
}

interface UserConfig {
  modules: ModuleConfig[];
}

const DEFAULT_MODULES: ModuleConfig[] = [
  { path: "./modules/default.ts", name: "default" },
];

async function loadModule(modulePath: string): Promise<any> {
  try {
    const module = await import(modulePath);
    return module;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Failed to load module ${modulePath}:`, error);
    throw error;
  }
}

function parseUserConfig(): UserConfig {
  const config: UserConfig = { modules: [] };
  
  // Check environment variables
  const envModules = Deno.env.get("MODULES");
  if (envModules) {
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(envModules);
      if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
        config.modules = parsed;
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Invalid MODULES environment variable:", error);
    }
  }
  
  // If no env config, use default
  if (config.modules.length === 0) {
    config.modules = DEFAULT_MODULES;
  }
  
  return config;
}

async function handleRequest(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const queryParams = url.searchParams;
  
  // Get module path from query parameters or use default
  let modulePaths: string[] = [];
  
  const queryModule = queryParams.get("module");
  if (queryModule) {
    modulePaths = [queryModule];
  } else {
    const userConfig = parseUserConfig();
    modulePaths = userConfig.modules.map(m => m.path);
  }
  
  // Load modules dynamically
  const loadedModules: any[] = [];
  for (const path of modulePaths) {
    try {
      const module = await loadModule(path);
      loadedModules.push(module);
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(`Failed to load module: ${error.message}`, {
        status: 500,
      });
    }
  }
  
  // Execute loaded modules
  const results: any[] = [];
  for (const module of loadedModules) {
    if (typeof module.default === 'function') {
      try {
        const result = await module.default(request);
        results.push(result);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Module execution error:", error);
        results.push({ error: error.message });
      }
    } else {
      results.push(module);
    }
  }
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(results), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

Deno.serve(handleRequest);
